meaning: n.实践,实习,例题,习题,现实
examples: Here the advantage of praxis over general theories is apparent.
To research it has great theory value and praxis function using for reference.
Praxis is not only the body of social ontology, but also the body of aesthetics, beauty and art.
The overall impact of agriculture on the economy is much greater than generally assumed, notes my colleague Delore Zimmerman, of Praxis Strategy Group.
The MMA Praxis funds invest according to Mennonite beliefs, and focus on promoting causes like AIDS prevention and stamping out predatory lending.
